What We Offer

OUR SERVICES

01
01 · Service
Moss & Algae Removal
We manually remove moss, algae, and lichen from the entire roof surface without blasting high pressure into your shingles. Safe for asphalt, composite, and wood shakes.
Asphalt Shingles Composite Wood Shakes Full Roof
Custom Quote · Text Us
02
02 · Service
Treatment & Prevention
After removal we apply a moss-inhibiting treatment that kills remaining spores and slows regrowth. One of the most important steps — without it, moss comes back fast in Sacramento's wet season.
Inhibitor Treatment Spore Kill Regrowth Delay
Custom Quote · Text Us
03
03 · Service
Gutter & Roof Edge Clear
Moss and debris always end up in gutters and along the roof edge. We clear it all out as part of the job so nothing is just pushed from one place to another.
Gutter Cleanout Roof Edge Debris Removal
Custom Quote · Text Us

Why It Matters

MOSS DESTROYS
ROOFS.

Moss holds moisture against your shingles. Over time that moisture works under the shingles, lifts them, and causes rot, leaks, and structural damage. What looks like just a cosmetic problem is actively shortening your roof's life.

Catching it early is everything. A moss removal job costs a fraction of what a roof repair or full replacement does — and it keeps your home protected.

✦Prevents shingle lifting, cracking, and moisture damage
✦Extends roof lifespan significantly — saves on replacement
✦Improves curb appeal and home value immediately
✦Treatment keeps moss from coming back for years
MOSS
